reviews.review_msg: I thought Bob was awesome and he probably had a greater impact on me than any other professor in eight years of University (160 credits earned in five years at SFU).  I see negative comments.  The thing about numerical analysis is that it builds on calculus and algebra but it really is a different mindset from other math classes.
he is very humous
The course is easy and the exams are fair. He's helpful but his lecture is a little bit boring.

He's a great guy who simply cannot lecture well. Work hard to understand the concepts in the textbook--there's a lot of material in this class, and he's not afraid to test you on it (not just applying but understanding concepts). His exams are tough, but you get a formula sheet and scaling is generous.
He is a good teacher... Its just what he teaches is too complex and intense. can not blame him

This prof is not that bad as people think. He knows his stuff well, but doesn't know how to teach. The course itself is really hard, His exams are killer as well, but if you study hard and clear your concepts, you can do really well in this course.

His notes are no different than the text book.Never actually explain how to do assignment problems with computer(u've to learn to program urself). He sometimes will ask "how many is following me?" and only less than 5-8 students raise hand out of 100 students. His exams are difficult. no cheat sheets,open book and formula on the back of the test.

HE GIVES THE HARDEST EXAMS!!! DO NOT TAKE HIS CLASS IF YOU WANT TO RECEIVE A HIGH GRADE. ALL HIS LECTURE MATERIALS ARE FROM THE TEXTBOOK SO LEARNING FROM THE TEXT IS SAME THING AS GOING TO HIS CLASS. HORRIBLE CLASS!!!

HORRIBLE PROFESSOR! He mumbles all the time and does not explain the concepts properly. The exams are ridiculously difficult. He does not provide the solutions to sample exams and assignments. Hence, there is no way to know what the correct answer is. He mumbles all the time. This is my last sem at SFU and Bob Russel is the worst Prof at SFU!!
Just don't take this class with him.exams are extremely hard :(

Exams and assignments are extremely hard and long.  Homework takes hours to finish each week, and counts for very little.  He isn't able to explain concepts/ideas to most of the class, since he assumes you already know everything.  However, he is a very nice person and is very approachable.  He wants to ensure you don't fail, and will help if asked

He has lots of mistakes in his notes which are not as useful as the textbook. He is aware that this subject is difficult but is unable to clarify it so students can understand. He does however try to make jokes in class and cares a lot for his students..

One prof that is very easy to approach. If u ask him for help, he's gonna give it to u. Not a world class prof, but i cant imagine anyone teaching this course well.  But hes a fun guy who tries hard to teach his students. Tests are fair, homework is messed.. but the average seems to b consistently low(not many kids comes to lectures)
Hippie..good prof

Not a good prof. Notes were handwritten until he realized no one could read them. Would not recommend but if you get stuck with him make sure to go over material before lecture. He's a pretty nice guy just not very good at teaching. Exams were easier than expected.
worst prof ever!!! class averages for both midterms were under 50 percent. The class this semester taking 154 had midterm averages of  74! plus his notes are not legible.

Ok.i had math 154 with him. he isn't the sort of a teacher that would repeat alot,so if u wanna follow him,u better do pre-lecture readings or if u have taken calc in highschool it will help u heck of a lottt.i passed this course with A+ and was the 2nd highest mark in class. my experience tells u: DO THE HOMEWORK+ALWAYS TAKE UR PROBLEMS TO THE LAB

I realize that he knows his stuff and really tries to help us understand everything. Except, not only are his notes extremely long and detailed (not in the helpful way), but his writing (which he uses to write all the notes) are completely incomprehensible. Lectures were a real waste of time.

WORST TEACHER EVER! I really dont expect this at a university level, but he really cant teach! his lectures are pointless, he mumbles, notes not legible midterms are hard and he is just such a bad teacher!!!! wow

midterms and final are fair. lecture is useless. prof knows his stuff but is simply awful at teaching the class. notes are ok but very messy. the course is hard but if u attend the workshops and use the TA's you will be fine.

does wants his students to do well and even says things to lighten up the mood sometimes. he knows his stuff but simply talks too fast and writes too messy for any avg student to follow, exams are not easy either.
He is an extremely nice person and truly wants his students to succeed. Make sure that you go to class an pay attention though, as his notes are quite messy and hard to follow.

The worst prof ever.... he's the worst egg in the basket... his test are way to hard for the level and he can't explain properly. No one listens to him in class cause he can't teach... Just not a good prof, period...
needs writing lessons and he can't really teach..but he seems nice
Not very clear writing and VERY messy notes, but overall very helpful and fair exams.

This guy probaly got bad ratings cause he got 1 for clarity. Can't explain****..2/3 of the class doesn't come for hte lectures cause it's just terrible. Notes suck ass, and he talks to himself rather than teaching. His exams (especially final) are reasonable though, as is his curving.
His notes are messy and he explains things very quickly.  Otherwise, his tests are reasonable.

Extremely difficult exams;poor examination protocol (changed actual numbering on exam 3 times during midterm!!!) Notes are useless and teaches way to fast to comprehend...unless you are a genius in math or an international student who spends every hour studying calculus. AWFUL!!
can't learn anything at all from his lecture, he's just like talking to himself instead of teaching & his notes r super messy~ i learned everything from the textbook only~
One of the worst prof. i've had. He makes things very unclear and no body can read his writing. Go over stuff extremely fast. HE CAN'T TEACH!!!!

This course is too easy for him, everyone is supposed to understand everything already. Pretty hard to follow if you are not major in math, and the exam is brutal...don't expect to take this 100 level to raise your GPA.

Awesome prof... the most inspiring one in the dept. so far =) Managed to take abstract concepts and bring them down to earth... (aka bus-stop language)... just don't expect step-by-step notes... he can't write so make sure you listen ;) and bring kleenex.
one of the best teacher in SFU math dept. His explanation is very clear. but don't miss his class otherwise you will get a low mark in his course.
